user.title: AWS Infrastructure Monitor
user.description: Configure your AWS account for monitoring

data_description.account_name: A friendly name for this AWS account
data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often to poll AWS APIs (5-60 minutes)
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Enables history graphs for resource counts (uses more sensors)

services.title: Select Services to Monitor
services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Only enable services you actually use. The next step will show the minimum IAM policy needed for your selection.

iam_policy.title: IAM Policy
iam_policy.description:
Apply this minimum IAM policy to your AWS user before clicking Finish. It contains only the permissions needed for your selected services.

```json
{policy}
```

Policy covers {service_count} service(s). See IAM_POLICY.md in the repository for the full per-service reference.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid AWS credentials. Please check your Access Key ID and Secret Access Key.

abort.already_configured: This AWS account is already configured.

data_description.refresh_interval_minutes: How often to poll AWS APIs (5-60 minutes)
data_description.cost_refresh_interval: How often to check AWS Cost Explorer (60-1440 minutes). Cost data updates once daily — checking more often wastes money ($0.01 per API call).
data_description.region_mode: Choose whether to monitor all regions or select specific ones
data_description.create_individual_count_sensors: Enables history graphs for resource counts (uses more sensors)
data_description.skip_initial_refresh: Speeds up Home Assistant startup (data appears after first refresh cycle)

data_description.regions: Select one or more AWS regions. Deselect all to monitor no regions.

select_services.title: Select Services to Monitor
select_services.description: Choose which AWS services to monitor. Removing a service will delete its sensors. Adding a service may require updating your IAM policy.

iam_additions.title: IAM Policy Update Required
iam_additions.description:
You have added services that require new IAM permissions. Add the following actions to your IAM policy before saving:

```
{actions}
```

If you do not update the IAM policy, the new services will show permission errors in the logs.
